message:
4 validation errors for DocumentConverter.convert
1.lax-or-strict[lax=union[json-or-python[json=function-after[path_validator(), str],python=is-instance[Path]],function-after[path_validator(), str]],strict=json-or-python[json=function-after[path_validator(), str],python=is-instance[Path]]]
  Input should be an instance of Path [type=is_instance_of, input_value=<_io.BytesIO object at 0x7f8c8c5831a0>, input_type=BytesIO]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/is_instance_of
1.str
  Input should be a valid string [type=string_type, input_value=<_io.BytesIO object at 0x7f8c8c5831a0>, input_type=BytesIO]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_type
1.DocumentStream
  Input should be a valid dictionary or instance of DocumentStream [type=model_type, input_value=<_io.BytesIO object at 0x7f8c8c5831a0>, input_type=BytesIO]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/model_type
1.HttpSource

    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/model_type
